name: Prompt Improvement Suggestions
description: Suggest improvements to analysis prompts themselves
prompt:
Analyze prompt effectiveness and suggest improvements:

1. Clarity and specificity of instructions
2. Coverage of edge cases
3. Output format consistency
4. Missing analysis areas
5. Redundancy across prompts
6. Language/framework coverage
7. Actionability of suggestions
8. Priority/severity calibration

Provide improved prompt versions with reasoning.
